_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of operating system command line/prompt.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of Linux operating system fundamentals relevant to data engineering, including file system structure, process management, user and permission models, package management, and common command-line utilities for text processing and system monitoring.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-008 (TF, cosine: 0.450), AI-T-006 (AI, cosine: 0.447).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.7/10 (raw 0.573). Shared vocabulary: [command, knowledge, line, operating, system]. DCWF-only terms [prompt] vs WIDAI-only terms [common, data, engineering, file, fundamentals, linux] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.876 (P=0.904, R=0.851). P exceeds R by 0.053 — the DCWF element's 6 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 32 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of operating system command line/prompt." and "Knowledge of Linux operating system fundamentals relevant to data engineering, i" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.603 ≈ STS 0.573 (gap 0.029). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [command, knowledge, line, operating, system] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 20.7%. Shared tokens: [command, knowledge, line, operating, system]. DCWF-only: [prompt]. WIDAI-only: [common, data, engineering, file, fundamentals, linux].
